description: This unofficial extension integrates Draw.io into VS Code.
viewsWelcome.drawio-welcome.contents:
Create or open a Draw.io diagram to get started.
[New Diagram](command:FrankSAURET.vscode-drawio.newDiagram)
[Open Diagram](command:FrankSAURET.vscode-drawio.openDiagram)
commands.convert.title: Convert To...
commands.export.title: Export To...
commands.toggleCodeLinkActivation.title: Toggle Code Link Activation
commands.changeTheme.title: Change Theme
commands.editDiagramAsText.title: Edit Diagram As Text (Experimental)
commands.linkCodeWithSelectedNode.title: Link Code with Selected Node
commands.newDiagram.title: New Draw.io Diagram
commands.openDiagram.title: Open Draw.io Diagram
commands.linkFileWithSelectedNode.title: Link File With Selected Node
commands.linkWsSymbolWithSelectedNode.ti: Link Workspace Symbol With Selected Node
commands.openAsText.title: Open Source Code Beside
commands.openAsDiagram.title: Open Diagram Beside
configuration.general.title: General
configuration.offline.title: Use Offline Mode
configuration.offline.description: When enabled, the bundled instance of Draw.io is used.
configuration.online-url.title: Online URL
configuration.online-url.description: The app to use when offline mode is disabled.
configuration.codeLinkActivated.title: Code Link Enabled
configuration.codeLinkActivated.descript: When activated, selecting a node will navigate to an associated code section.
configuration.local-storage.title: Draw.io Local Storage
configuration.local-storage.description: Only change this property if you know what you are doing. Manual changes to this property are not supported!
configuration.simpleLabels.title: Use SimpleLabels
configuration.simpleLabels.description: When enabled, no ForeignObjects are used in the svg.
configuration.zoomFactor.title: Draw.io zoom factor
configuration.zoomFactor.description: Defines the zoom factor for mouse wheel and trackpad zoom.
configuration.globalVars.title: Draw.io global variables.
configuration.globalVars.description: Defines global variables for system-wide placeholders using a JSON structure with key, value pairs. Keep the number of global variables small.
configuration.resizeImages.title: Draw.io resize images.
configuration.resizeImages.description: If set to true, images are resized automatically on paste. If not defined, the user will be asked to confirm the resize.
configuration.plugins.title: Plugins
configuration.plugins.section.title: Plugins
configuration.plugins.description: Loads Draw.io plugins from the local filesystem. See description of the `file` property. See [plugins documentation](https://github.com/hediet/vscode-drawio/blob/master/docs/plugins.md).
configuration.knownPlugins.title: Known Plugins
configuration.knownPlugins.description: List of allowed or denied plugins. The extension will read and write to this list based on what the user decides when loading specific plugins. See [plugins documentation](https://github.com/hediet/vscode-drawio/blob/master/docs/plugins.md).
configuration.customLibraries.title: Custom Libraries
configuration.customLibraries.descriptio: Configures the Draw.io editor to use custom libraries.
configuration.themeAndStyles.title: Theme and styles
configuration.styles.title: Styles
configuration.styles.description: Defines an array of objects that contain the colours (fontColor, fillColor, strokeColor and gradientColor) for the Style tab of the format panel if the selection is empty. These objects can have a commonStyle (which is applied to both vertices and edges), vertexStyle (applied to vertices) and edgeStyle (applied to edges), and a graph with background and gridColor. An empty object means apply the default colors
configuration.defaultVertexStyle.title: Default Vertex Style
configuration.defaultEdgeStyle.title: Default Edge Style
configuration.colorNames.title: Color Names
configuration.colorNames.description: Names for colors, eg. {'FFFFFF': 'White', '000000': 'Black'} that are used as tooltips (uppercase, no leading # for the colour codes)
configuration.presetColors.title: Preset Colors
configuration.presetColors.description: Color codes for the upper palette in the color dialog.
configuration.customColorSchemes.title: Custom Color Schemes
configuration.customColorSchemes.descrip: Available color schemes in the style section at the top of the format panel. See example [here](https://www.diagrams.net/doc/faq/custom-colours-confluence-cloud#default-colour-schemes---format-panel)
configuration.customFonts.title: Custom Fonts
configuration.customFonts.description: Configures the Draw.io editor to use custom fonts.
configuration.theme.title: Draw.io Theme
configuration.theme.description: The theme to use for the Draw.io editor. Use "automatic" to automatically choose a Draw.io theme that matches your current VS Code theme.
configuration.appearance.title: Draw.io Appearance
configuration.appearance.description: The appearance to use for the Draw.io editor. Use "automatic" to automatically choose a Draw.io theme that matches your current VS Code theme.
